name: Loki Error-Log Alert
description: Scheduled cluster error-log email alert: Cron (every 12h) → Loki query for error/fatal/panic lines → Agent incident summary → Decision (email only if errors found) → SMTP send. The agent binds the in-cluster inference router (provider: internal, resource internal_pool_router, model qwen3.5:9b). Requires workspace resources `aithericon_loki` (loki), `internal_pool_router` + `internal_pool_registry` (internal LLM), and `mail` (smtp) — all auto-seeded from demos/resources/; swap `mail` for a real relay (and widen the Loki `since`) for production use.
